Name: Data Classification and Labeling
Description: All data stored or processed in Azure must be classified and labeled according to Contoso Bank's information security classification scheme.
Framework: Contoso Bank Azure Security Control Framework

AdditionalInfo.Action: Use Microsoft Purview Information Protection to apply labels such as Confidential, Internal, or Public; integrate with Azure Policy and Defender for Cloud for compliance.
AdditionalInfo.Note: This dummy control is generated by ChatGPT. It is designed for demonstration purposes only.
